channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothole, 13th March
item.description:
Pothole on the other carriageway - a few yards from the ones you repaired but obviously no-one bothered to look further
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged manhole, 13th March
item.description:
A severe noise is emitted when vehicles drive over

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Charlton Lane, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple people urinating & vomiting in street, 13th March
item.description:
Dunalley St, from Holiday Inn to St Paul's Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Dunalley Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 13th March

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 13th March
item.description:

item.title: Urgent Road Resurfacing Needed on Tone Drive, 13th March
item.description:
Cracks all through Tone drive. A bike could very easily hit any one of the potholes or uneven road elements and it could be nasty accident. As the pictures show water is often pooling in all areas of the road too. The road has suffered for years being neglected. Often quick patch jobs, a full complete resurface needs to happen properly. The residents are happy for the inconvenience to get the road fixed once and for all.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tone Drive, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 13th March
item.description:
CWPH 600 x 600 x 54mm Not Marked Road Closure (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous potholes as water is running down the road, 13th March
item.description:
The potholes are in the road between The Bittams and the white gates each side of the road at Crippetts Farm.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crippetts Lane, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Children's Dresser, 13th March
item.description:
This has been here all week. Household rubbish consistently dumped in this area. From freezers to trolleys to general household waste. Its a consistent problem that needs fixing. Our residential area is NOT a dumping ground. Its horrible individuals are treating it as such.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tone Drive, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
